hooks.command: sh -c 'INPUT=$(cat); NAME=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r .name); CWD=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r .cwd); DIR="$CWD/.claude/worktrees/$NAME"; BRANCH="claude/$NAME"; git -C "$CWD" worktree add -b "$BRANCH" "$DIR" HEAD >&2; cp "$CWD/apps/mesh/.env" "$DIR/apps/mesh/.env" 2>/dev/null >&2 || true; echo "$DIR"'
